tool_calls.name: manage_tasks
tool_calls.arguments:
{"action": "create", "title": "Add in-memory cache for get_project_tree", "description": "Type: Task
Goal: Add in-memory cache to get_project_tree tool with file-change invalidation.
Current State: GetProjectTreeTool in internal/infrastructure/tools/get_project_tree_tool.go generates tree on every call by walking filesystem.
Changes Required:
  1. Add TreeCache struct with sync.RWMutex, cached result, and timestamp
  2. Invalidate cache when file watcher detects changes (or use TTL-based approach)
  3. Add unit tests for cache hit, cache miss, and invalidation
Constraints: Cache must be thread-safe. Don't change tool interface.", "acceptance_criteria": ["get_project_tree returns cached result on second call", "Cache invalidates on file changes", "Thread-safe under concurrent access", "Unit tests pass"]}

messages.content: Task task_cache_001 created and approved by user. You can now start it and create subtasks.

Задача запущена. Я уже прочитал get_project_tree_tool.go — вижу GetProjectTreeTool struct с proxy и projectRoot. Нет кэша. Создаю подзадачи:
1. TreeCache struct с sync.RWMutex, TTL invalidation, thread-safe Get/Invalidate
2. Unit тесты для cache hit, miss, invalidation, concurrent access
Начинаю с первой.
